mechanism_narrative: Rising CPIAUCSL values indicate accelerating inflation, which forces discount rates higher and compresses equity valuations, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC exceeds 0.05 over a 3-year rolling window or forward returns are positive in >65% of months with rising CPIAUCSL.

mechanism_narrative: When UNRATE crosses above 5.0 percent, labor market slack triggers immediate profit margin compression and recession fears, driving negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in >60% of triggered instances despite the threshold crossing.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in GDPC1 and RSAFS signals broad-based aggregate demand growth that sustains corporate earnings momentum, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Interaction term loses statistical significance (p > 0.10) in out-of-sample regression or 60-day forward returns are negative in >55% of joint expansion periods.

mechanism_narrative: Declining INDPRO values during a late-cycle expansion indicate supply chain bottlenecks and capacity constraints that erode corporate margins, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Signal direction flips to positive or Rank IC falls below 0.02 during late-cycle expansion phases over a 2-year walk-forward test.

mechanism_narrative: Increasing PAYEMS values reflect robust nonfarm payrolls growth that supports consumer spending and equity risk appetite, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in >60% of months with rising PAYEMS or rolling Rank IC remains below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS exceeds 3.5 percent, restrictive monetary policy conditions reduce liquidity and increase borrowing costs, suppressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are positive in >65% of triggered instances or the threshold effect vanishes in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising HOUST and falling CPIAUCSL indicates housing market resilience without inflationary pressure, creating a favorable risk environment that produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint signal fails to beat baseline or 20-day forward returns are negative in >55% of divergence periods over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in UNRATE during a post-shock recovery phase signals rapid labor market normalization that boosts growth expectations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Signal direction reverses or predictive accuracy drops below 52% during post-shock recovery regimes in walk-forward validation.
